channel.description: World News Today: Read the latest world news headlines, Current International breaking news world wide. In depth analysis and top news headlines world wide.

image.title: World News, Today World News, Latest International News, World Breaking News, Trending News of World - Times of India

item.title: Quote of the day by Alfred Nobel: “A heart can no more be forced to love than a stomach can be forced to digest food by persuasion.”
item.dc:creator: TOI Science Desk

item.title: The hidden reason humans may never build a self-sufficient city on Mars
item.dc:creator: TOI Science Desk

item.title: This 1,000-year-old Viking treasure found in Denmark contains nearly pure gold arm rings
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: No sunset until August: Inside Alaska’s northernmost town living through 84 days of endless daylight
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: ‘You have lost trust of public’: UK min quits, calls grow for PM Starmer to resign
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: British-Nigerian father who abducted 5-year-old son enjoyed pub night before fleeing after jail blunder
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Quest for a rare bird, a landfill visit, a deadly outbreak: How Leo Schilperoord became hantavirus 'patient zero'
item.description: A Dutch ornithologist, Leo Schilperoord, has been identified as patient zero in a deadly hantavirus outbreak on the MV Hondius cruise ship. Authorities suspect he and his wife contracted the virus from rat droppings during a birdwatching trip in Argentina. The outbreak led to multiple deaths and a global health alert.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Horrifying video shows moment Frontier Airlines plane hits person on Denver runway
item.description: A shocking incident at Denver International Airport saw a person, who allegedly breached security, fatally struck by a departing Frontier Airlines jet. The collision ignited an engine fire, forcing an emergency evacuation. Several passengers sustained minor injuries during the chaotic scene, with the NTSB now reviewing the evacuation response.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: HasanAbi loses his cool on Twitch after “white baby” comment sparks heated rant
item.description: HasanAbi sparked major online debate after angrily reacting to a Twitch viewer who called him a “white baby” during a discussion about anti-DEI movements and racism. The political streamer defended his comments by stressing his experiences as a Muslim American facing discrimination and rejected claims that he was being anti-Asian. Clips from the livestream quickly spread online, with viewers divided over whether Hasan’s emotional response was justified or an overreaction to a joke.
item.dc:creator: Barsha Dutta

item.title: "Before Charlie was assassinated....": Candace Owens dragged into online conspiracy storm involving Charlie Kirk, Erika Kirk and Dan Bilzerian
item.description: Candace Owens is facing fresh online controversy after a viral social media post linked her to Dan Bilzerian while referencing Charlie Kirk, Erika Kirk and Ben Shapiro. The post made several unverified allegations and reignited debate around Owens’ past interactions with Bilzerian, including resurfaced comments about private text messages. While no evidence has supported the claims spreading online, the controversy has fuelled intense speculation, backlash and political infighting across social media platforms.
item.dc:creator: Barsha Dutta

item.title: Two more passengers evacuated from cruise ship test hantavirus+
item.description: Passengers from the MV Hondius cruise ship, affected by a deadly hantavirus outbreak, are being repatriated and quarantined globally. A French woman and an American have tested positive, with the French passenger's health worsening. Health authorities are managing the situation, emphasizing low public risk and early treatment benefits.

item.title: Portrait looted by Nazis found in home of Dutch SS leader's family: Art sleuth
item.description: Two men were arrested in connection with a meticulously planned cash van robbery in Ghaziabad. The gang surveilled the vehicle for six months and rehearsed the heist four times before stealing nearly Rs 27 lakh. Police uncovered the operation after reviewing CCTV footage and identified the mastermind.

item.title: Keir Starmer vows to bring UK, EU closer amid exit calls
Google says criminal hackers used AI to find software flaw
item.description: Cybercriminals have reportedly leveraged artificial intelligence to craft a potent hacking tool capable of circumventing security measures in a widely used system administration software. Google's security team uncovered this novel threat, which exploited an unknown vulnerability to bypass multi-factor authentication. The developer was alerted and patched the flaw before it could be weaponized, marking a significant development in AI-driven cyberattacks.

item.title: French streamer PrinceofParis allegedly exposed after Airbnb host interrupts livestream
item.description: French streamer PrinceofParis faced online scrutiny after an Airbnb host unexpectedly appeared during a livestream from a supposed luxury castle. The influencer abruptly ended the broadcast, fueling speculation about the authenticity of his opulent lifestyle. The incident has sparked widespread debate about the reality behind influencers' online personas, with no official statement yet released.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: What happened to Nikodem Czyżewski? Missing YouTuber found dead weeks later in Croatia
item.description: Polish YouTuber Nikodem Czyżewski, known as Lil Narcyz, has been found dead in Croatia after a month-long disappearance. The 23-year-old creator, popular for his comedy and diss tracks, was last heard from on April 8. Authorities confirmed his body's identification in Croatia, leaving fans shocked and seeking answers about his final days.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: Iran says ready to ‘teach a lesson’ if attacked after Trump trashes peace proposal
item.description: Iran's armed forces are prepared to retaliate after President Trump rejected Tehran's ceasefire proposal, escalating regional tensions. The dispute over the Strait of Hormuz, a critical oil route, has already caused significant energy supply shocks and threatens global food security, with the UN warning of a potential humanitarian crisis.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Donald Trump 'seriously considering' making Venezuela the 51st state of US
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Only favors Indian-origin candidates: Chinese-American professor sues university in Texas, accuses Hemang Desai of bias
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: ChudTheBuilder breaks silence after Nashville arrest and shocking FBI questioning over restaurant dispute
item.description: Dalton ChudTheBuilder has responded after being arrested in Nashville following a reported restaurant dispute. The streamer claimed FBI officials and a domestic terrorist detective questioned him while he spent nearly 13 hours in custody. He denied intentionally refusing to pay for food and said he never received his full meal. The incident quickly became a major talking point across social media platforms.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy
